title: Exclusive: James Wan Returns to 'The Conjuring' Franchise at New Line — Now Meet the Rest of the Team
description: Plus, Sydney Sweeney returns to Apple with a 'Fast & Furious' director in tow, and a look at the trailer for John Swab's 'King Ivory,' which landed the director a big gig at Netflix.
author: The InSneider

title: Artificial Intelligence Weighs In on Plausibility of AI-Themed Spec Script 'Alignment,' Which Sold for 7 Figures
description: Plus, the carve-outs in James Mangold's Paramount deal, casting rumors for the 'Miami Vice' reboot, and why Hollywood shouldn't be worried about AI "actress" Tilly Norwood.
author: The InSneider

title: Exclusive: Angela Bassett, Teyana Taylor, Kam Patterson in Talks to Join Kevin Hart's Netflix Comedy '72 Hours'
description: Plus, a casting scoop about Taylor Sheridan's new movie 'F.A.S.T.,' a new release date for 'The Legend of Zelda,' and Channing Tatum hops on a motorcycle with Brad Pitt.
author: The InSneider

title: Exclusive: John C. Reilly Joins David Leitch's Action Thriller 'How to Rob a Bank' at Amazon MGM Studios
description: The high-octane crime movie boasts a talented young ensemble that includes Nicholas Hoult, Zoë Kravitz, Pete Davidson, Anna Sawai, and Rhenzy Feliz.
author: The InSneider
